name: Crab-Stuffed Sole
recipeIngredient: Topping: 1 cup Grated Swiss cheese, 1/2 tsp Paprika
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Combine filling ingredients and spread over fillets.
3. Roll each fillet into a tube shape and place seam-side down in baking dish.
4. To make sauce, melt butter in a saucepan, then blend in flour and salt. Simmer for two minutes.
5. Stir in milk and wine, and simmer until the mixture thickens, stirring constantly.
6. Pour sauce over fillets and bake at 400°F for 15 minutes.
7. Sprinkle with cheese. Bake until cheese melts.
8. Sprinkle with paprika and parsley.
